key_requirements: Agent trait interface (run, run_with_handler) — base for new TypedAgent<I, O>
Agent builder pattern (CodingAgentBuilder) — RestructureAgentBuilder follows same pattern
LLMProvider trait — RestructureAgent calls complete() via complete_structured()
Module dependency graph — agents/restructure/ fits in agents module
Class hierarchy — TypedAgent<I, O> extends Agent abstraction
Message type — used in prompt assembly
Role enum — system/user/assistant for prompt construction

notes: Trimmed to directly relevant specs only. SpecStore trait, TypedAgent<I, O>, RestructureInput/Output, and prompt template are NEW — no existing specs cover them. Storage, security, streaming, tools, integrations are out of scope for this stateless, platform-agnostic agent.
